# ASM6f in Warp Whistle

Warp Whistle vendors `asm6f_64.exe` from the official ASM6f v1.6_f03
release for its opt-in NES patch packages. The executable is launched hidden;
its assembler diagnostics are returned to the editor.

Source and release: https://github.com/freem/asm6f/releases/tag/v1.6_f03

The upstream redistribution grant is retained verbatim in
`readme-original.txt`. Do not replace this executable without updating the
pinned version in `.github/workflows/build.yml` and running the patch suite.
